Items on Reserve (for Classes) Reserve a Study Space MakerLab Serving the SIUE Community Did your professor say something is “on reserve”? The Library has you covered. Do you need a space to work on a group project or need a place to meet with your study group? You can actually reserve this ahead of time! Faculty can place materials on reserve for various courses and even schedule a session for their classes. The library also offers library proxy forms that can be requested if a graduate assistant needs to check out things on behalf of a faculty member. Additionally, you can find information about our institutional repository, SPARK, where you can upload and store your published research. For Faculty Place Materials on Reserve SIUE Institutional Repository (SPARK) Request a Library Proxy Schedule an Instruction Session Â
